0.0.1.en: Initial alpha release with Salus Cloud login, device pairing, and live temperature and humidity readings.

0.0.2.en: First publish-quality update with metadata, image, and packaging fixes.

0.0.3.en: Updated app and driver artwork for the App Store and pairing experience.

0.1.0.en: Introduced thermostat control with Homey on/off standby behavior, responsive local state updates during Salus cloud sync, and improved operating-mode reliability so idle cooling no longer flips back to heating from ambiguous cloud flags.
